## CYB-203

Adds cross-language contract fixtures and tests proving generated Python and Go schema models validate and serialize the same schema-defined messages.

### Coverage

- Adds shared contract fixtures under `contract-fixtures/v1`.
- Adds Python tests that validate fixtures with generated Pydantic models and assert JSON round-trips.
- Adds Go tests that validate fixtures with generated Go models and assert JSON round-trips.
- Adds a shared invalid fixture proving both languages reject a missing required field.
